Meta.description: Free online calculators for loan interest, BMI, unit conversion, and more.
Meta.keywords: online calculator, free calculator, loan calculator, unit converter, calculator tools

Footer.disclaimer: These calculators are for reference only and actual results may differ.

Home.title: Free Online Calculators
Home.subtitle: Loan, health, unit conversion, and other everyday calculators in one place
Home.loanDesc: Calculate monthly payments and total interest for equal payment, equal principal, and bullet repayment plans
Home.bmiDesc: Calculate your Body Mass Index (BMI) and weight category from height and weight
Home.unitDesc: Convert length, weight, temperature, area, and more
Home.salaryDesc: Instantly calculate monthly take-home pay after Korean social insurance and income tax deductions

LoanPage.metaDescription: Calculate your monthly payment and total interest for equal payment, equal principal, and bullet (interest-only) repayment plans.
LoanPage.subtitle: Calculate interest for equal payment, equal principal, and bullet repayment plans
LoanPage.guideEqualInstallmentDesc: Pay the same amount every month. Predictable monthly payment.
LoanPage.guideEqualPrincipalDesc: Pay the same principal every month. Relatively lower total interest.
LoanPage.guideBalloonDesc: Pay only interest during the term, then repay the full principal at maturity.

BmiPage.metaDescription: Enter your height and weight to calculate your Body Mass Index (BMI) and weight category.
BmiPage.subtitle: Check your Body Mass Index and weight category from height and weight

BmiCalculator.underAdvice: Gaining some weight may help improve your health.
BmiCalculator.normalAdvice: Maintain your current weight. You're in a healthy range.
BmiCalculator.overAdvice: Diet control and regular exercise are recommended.
BmiCalculator.obese1Advice: Consult a doctor before starting a weight loss plan.
BmiCalculator.obese2Advice: Getting help from a medical professional is recommended.

UnitPage.metaDescription: Convert length, weight, temperature, area, and other units instantly.
UnitPage.subtitle: Easily convert length, weight, temperature, and area units

SalaryPage.metaDescription: Enter your annual salary in Korea to instantly calculate monthly take-home pay after 4 major social insurances and income tax. Based on 2024 deduction rates.
SalaryPage.subtitle: Monthly take-home pay after social insurance and income tax deductions (based on 2024 rates, Korea)

SalaryCalculator.localTax: Local Income Tax (10% of income tax)
SalaryCalculator.seoDesc1: Take-home pay is your pre-tax annual salary minus Korea's 4 major social insurances (national pension, health insurance, long-term care insurance, employment insurance) and income tax plus local income tax.
SalaryCalculator.seoDesc2: This calculator applies 2024 deduction rates. Actual take-home pay may vary depending on company policy and individual circumstances.

About.metaDescription: Calc Hub is a free online calculator and converter site anyone can use.
About.subtitle: Learn what Calc Hub is all about.
About.introBody: Calc Hub is a free collection of online tools that help you quickly and conveniently perform everyday calculations and conversions. No app installation needed — use it directly in your browser.
About.policy1: All services are provided free of charge.
About.policy2: Your input values are not stored on our servers.
About.policy3: Results are for reference only; consult a professional for important decisions.
About.policy4: We continuously add new tools to expand our services.
About.contactPrompt: If you have any questions or suggestions about our service, feel free to reach out.

Contact.metaDescription: Send us your questions about Calc Hub.
Contact.subtitle: Let us know about any issues, bugs, or suggestions.
Contact.name: Name
Contact.note: We'll reply by email within 1-3 business days.

Privacy.s1Body: Calc Hub ("the Site") values your privacy and complies with applicable data protection laws, including South Korea's Personal Information Protection Act. This policy explains what information the Site collects and how it is used.
Privacy.s2Intro: The Site does not directly collect personal information from users. However, the following information may be collected automatically.
Privacy.s2Item1: Usage statistics such as pages visited and time spent (Google Analytics)
Privacy.s2Item2: Cookies and interest-based data for serving ads (Google AdSense)
Privacy.s2Item3: Technical information such as IP address, browser type, and operating system
Privacy.s3Body1: The Site uses cookies through the Google AdSense advertising service. Cookies are small text files stored in your browser and used to personalize ads.
Privacy.s3Body2: You can refuse cookies in your browser settings. Note that disabling cookies may limit some site features.
Privacy.s4Body1: The Site displays ads through Google AdSense. Google uses cookies to serve ads based on your prior visits.
Privacy.s4Body2Pre: For more information about Google's advertising and privacy policies, see
Privacy.s5Body: The Site may contain links to external sites. The Site is not responsible for the privacy practices of external sites; please review their privacy policies separately.
Privacy.s6BodyPre: For questions about how we handle personal information, please contact us via the
Privacy.s7Body: This privacy policy may be updated to reflect changes in law or our services. Updates will be announced on this page.
